title: P9: Factory Integrity Enforcement — Backfill + FI-6 + Completion Tooling
intent: Restore and enforce the factory lifecycle so that Archon cannot continue governed work without completion evidence. Backfill 6 missing completion records (S8-S13). Implement FI-6 (no progression without completion) as a validation error. Add factory:complete helper script to make completion the natural next step after implementation. Fix the structural ability for lifecycle drift to recur.
